mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_ai_config (course_id, enabled, system_prompt, model, daily_limit, temperature, max_tokens, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{enabled}, #{systemPrompt}, #{model}, #{dailyLimit}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_ai_config SET enabled = #{enabled}, system_prompt = #{systemPrompt}, model = #{model}, daily_limit = #{dailyLimit}, temperature = #{temperature}, max_tokens = #{maxTokens}, update_time = NOW() WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
